bestPractices: Always use handler pattern (trigger delegates to handler class)
Implement recursion prevention with static boolean flag
Query outside loops, use Map for O(1) lookups
Collect records in List, perform single DML operation
Test with 200 records to verify bulkification
Add meaningful debug statements for troubleshooting
Check null before accessing relationship fields
Aim for <10 SOQL queries, <5 DML operations

templateUsageGuide.searchByTag: Use searchIndex.byTag to find templates with specific characteristics
templateUsageGuide.searchByComplexity: Use searchIndex.byComplexity to find templates matching your skill level
templateUsageGuide.searchByUseCase: Use searchIndex.byUseCase to find templates for specific business scenarios
templateUsageGuide.customization: All templates are starting points - customize for your specific requirements
templateUsageGuide.testing: Every trigger template has a corresponding test class template
templateUsageGuide.documentation: Update template comments with your specific business logic
